properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 C3 V4 V5 V6

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Blessed assurance, Jesus is mine O what a foretaste of glory divine Heir of salvation, purchase of God Born of His Spirit, washed in His blood

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Perfect submission, all is at rest I in my Savior am happy and blessed Watching and waiting, looking above Filled with His goodness, lost in His love

verse.name: C3
verse.lines: This is my story, this is my song Praising my Savior all the day long This is my story, this is my song Praising my Savior all the day long

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Oh what a Savior, wonderful Jesus

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: Death could not hold you, you are victorious Praise to the risen King

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: Oh what a Savior, wonderful Jesus Oh what a Savior, wonderful Jesus Oh what a Savior, wonderful Jesus Oh what a Savior
